abilities.name: Combustion
abilities.description: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack provides 1 stack of Combustion. Hitting an enemy god provides 2. At 4 stacks Agni's next Flame Wave or Rain Fire will ignite all enemies hit, dealing Magical Damage every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds. When Agni kills an enemy god, he goes on a Hot Streak. patch_samples.sample_text: Agni (Nerf)
Agni Aspect (Shift)

“Agni’s Aspect currently scales with the rank of the triggering ability, leading to his early game pressure to be quite high. A level 6 Agni with 3 ranks of Flame Wave will currently deal 108 Base, and potentially up to 180 Base at max stacks before we consider scaling. We are adjusting it to no longer consider the rank of the ability triggering and only consider Agni’s Level. The same situation w
Agni’s Basic Attacks now have a projectile sound.

* Agni
** Aspect of Combustion
*** Removed: Critical strikes no longer provide 2 stacks of Ignite

* Agni (Nerf)
** Aspect of Combustion
*** Rain Fire (4)
**** Decreased Damage from 135/175/215/255/295 to 120/150/180/210/240
** Rain Fire (4)
*** Increased Cooldown from 18s to 20s

* Agni
** New Aspect releasing April 28 - Aspect of Combustion
*** Your Basic Attacks now ignite enemies dealing damage over time and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume ignites dealing a burst of damage. Rain of Fire deals reduced damage.
Agni Buff

patch_samples.sample_text: Ares (Nerf)
Ares (Nerf)

* Ares Buff
** Searing Flesh (3)
*** Increased Damage Per Tick from 15/20/25/30/35 to 20/25/30/35/40
** No Escape (4)
*** Increased Initial Damage from 60/80/110/120/140 to 80/110/140/170/200
Ares gains 10/15/20/25/30 HPS while the buff is active on himself. This does not apply to his Aspect Call to Arms.
Ares Buff

* Ares No Escape now cripples enemies that he chains, meaning you are now unable to buffer movement abilities into his Ultimate. This ability will still cripple even when our CC Buffering tests are not active.
Ares Buff
Decreased the amount of STR and INT Ares grants to nearby allies to 50% of the effect he gains (6.25% prots and 50% cdr)
Decreased bonus Strength from Protections from Items from 20% to 12.5%
Initial Damage shifted from 65/90/115/140/165 + 25% Strength to 60/80/100/120/140 + 30% Strength

Artemis (Buff)
Artemis Aspect Nerf
Artemis trap no longer causes attacks to miss targets
Passive: Still Target - Artemis deals 15% increased Basic Attack Damage to gods and 30% to minions that are affected by Crowd Control

Artemis Non-Aspect traps should now stack correctly

patch_samples.sample_text: Athena (Buff)
Athena Buff

* Athena Buff
** Shield Wall (3)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 14s to 14/13.5/13/12.5/12
** Defender of Olympus (4)
*** Increased Shield Max Health Scaling from 12.5% to 15%

* Athena Buff
** Confound (2)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 18s to 16s
** Defender of Olympus (4)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 120s to 120/115/110/105/100s
Defender of Olympus now targets visible enemy gods instead of allies, dealing no landing damage but causing the enemy to take increased damage while Athena is channeling.

* General
** Fixed issues with lock on ability targeting for Athena and Neith ultimates where the ability wouldn’t cast correctly, and would be cancelled while moving
** Fixed issues with abilities that applied ramping Slows weren’t working properly 
** Fixes issues with Inhand Swaps causing lower than intended Attack Speed after abilities
** Fixed issues with god Bots getting stuck in fountain af
Athena Buff
Athena Buff
Athena is no longer affected by the in-hand slowing penalty when throwing Reach
Magical Protections increased from 20/25/30/35/40 to 15/20/25/30/35 + 10% Magical Protections
Damage Type changed from Physical to Magical
Taunt Duration scaling added: 0.2s per 150 Protections from Items, stacking up to 2 times.

patch_samples.sample_text: Baron Samedi (Buff)

“Baron Samedi, Yemoja, and the recent addition of Aspect Eset have been very strong at higher levels of play, pushing out other gods with their high ranged pressure and base damage. We are adjusting all three in different ways tailored to their unique cases. However, wanted to be reserved as Lifebinder, a key rush item, is also receiving adjustments in this patch to reduce that early pressure.”

Ex. Baron Samedi’s Consign Spirits does require hitting an enemy god, but can apply to a full team. Its ‘base’ amount of healing was more reduced, while its conditional component of healing hurt targets was hit a bit less.

* Baron Samedi
** Aspect of Hysteria - Releasing June 9
*** Hysteria applied over max deals damage. Max Hysteria no longer reduces damage. Consign Spirits only heals Baron. Vivid Gaze bonus now grants Hysteria over time, but no debuff.  Wrap It Up explosion and DoT apply Bonus Hysteria, but the explosion no longer Mesmerizes. Your personal Brew can be thrown every 20s.
Baron Samedi Buff

* Baron Samedi Buff
** Wrap It Up (3)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 16s to 16/15.5/15/14.5/14s
** Life of the Party (4)
*** Increased Slam Damage and Intelligence Scaling from 125/210/295/380/475 + 55% to 200/270/340/410/480 + 70%

“Baron Samedi had a bug in CA8 that reduced all enemies’ damage to every target, leading to a massive overperformance across the board. After fixing this, we gave him time to settle since he had been oppressive since his original release in Smite 2. Now, we’ve seen him struggle to perform, so we’re reverting a few of the changes we made before discovering the bug.”
Baron Samedi Buff
--- Baron Samedi's root volume increased. Baron Samedi "Ta-Da!" on A01 volume reduced

* Baron Samedi Nerf
** Consign Spirits
*** Decreased Heal from 30/60/90/120/150 to 30/55/80/105/130
*** Decreased Missing Health Heal from 2.5% to 2%
Baron Samedi Nerf

patch_samples.sample_text: This means that Bastet can no longer extend (or shorten) the hitbox with movement of her camera.
All Gods level 1 basic attack damage is reduced by 20%, across the board. This brings base basic attack damage more in-line with SMITE 1. It still scales as it did before.
Base Health has been adjusted to have a bigger gap between Gods associated with different traditional roles. Additionally some Gods had some Protections adjusted:

patch_samples.sample_text: Bonus Intelligence per 4 activations reduced from 3 to 2
Chronos Ultimate can no longer be cancelled with certain CCs
Chronos Mastery will now update properly everywhere
Hit sounds now duck the volume of other sounds to increase impact. I tried to write a joke for this, but Chronos said something about time being a flat circle and told me to get back to work.
Chronos Pendant Shift
Chronos Pendant Nerf

patch_samples.sample_text: Minion bonus damage increased from 55% to 60%
NEW: Now provides 10% Attack Speed when picked up. If an Ally picks up the Heart, Cupid also receives the Attack Speed buff.

* Cupid Nerf
** Aspect of Love
*** Heartbomb (1)
**** Decreased Initial Hit Damage Scaling from 30% Strength + 30% Intelligence to 15% Strength + 15% Intelligence
**** Decreased Explosion Damage from 30% Strength + 30% Intelligence to 15% Strength + 15% Intelligence
** Share the Love (2)
*** Decreased Base Damage from 80/130/180/230/280 to 65/115/165/215/265
Cupid Nerf

* Cupid Nerf
** Share the Love
*** Decreased Heal from 20/40/60/80/100 + 10% INT to 20/35/50/65/80 + 7.5% INT
** Fields of Love
*** Decreased Heal from 60/100/140/180/220 + 30% INT to 60/95/130/165/200 + 20% INT
New Feature: If Cupid has 8 stacks of Lovestruck, the explosion Stuns instead of Mesmerizes.
Dash forward quickly, gaining an Attack Speed buff and leaving behind a trail that lasts for 6s.

Duration reduced from 7s -> 5s
Da Ji - (Nerf)
Da Ji (Shift)

“We are seeing Junglers have too strong of an impact in the very early stages of the game; both in the potency of their ganks and how much farm they can accumulate. We will likely revisit overall map farm and pacing as we continue to see how the removal of the side camps have affected the map, but adjusting the Jungle starters lets us more quickly target this aspect of Conquest. Additionally, we s
Da Ji Aspect Damage on ability 2 basic attack scaling changed from 100% to 75%
Horrible Burns no longer burns but provides lifesteal and lasts for a short duration.
Trickster Spirit does less damage but provides an attack speed buff.

The God on your team with the highest damage dealth to the enemy gods gains a buff of Strength and Intelligence. Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.

patch_samples.sample_text: Guan Yu (Shift)
Guan Yu (Buff)

* Guan Yu
** Aspect Nerf
*** Conviction (1)
**** Decreased Bonus Heal Per Tick Base from 11/22/33/44/55 to 8/16/24/32/40.
**** Decreased Bonus Heal Per Tick Int Scaling from 4% to 3%.
*** Taolu Assault (3)
**** Decreased Intelligence Scaling from 8.75% to 7.5%.
** Non Aspect Shift
*** Conviction (1)
**** Decreased Heal Int Scaling from 20% to 12.5%.
*** Taolu Assault (3)
**** Increased Base Damage
* Guan Yu cooldown reduction effects no longer affect items. - Fixed on May 5

Battle Fervor now provides Intelligence instead of Attack Speed. Conviction now applies an additional Heal over Time and will share Protections from Taolu Assault. However, Guan Yu loses all Strength scaling

patch_samples.sample_text: Hades (Buff)
Hades (Buff)

* Hades Nerf
** Devour Souls (3)
*** Decreased Heal from 20/35/50/65/80 to 10/25/40/55/70
** Pillar of Agony (4)
*** Decreased Protections gained while channeling from 50/65/80/95/110 to 30/50/70/90/110

* Hades Shroud of Darkness (Ability 2) will now Silence in addition to Fearing when used on a Blighted target. This will not impact Diminishing Return stacks. This is to make sure that getting the better version of the ability doesn't allow buffering when the base does not.
Hades Buff
Hades Buff
Hades’ staff has been reworked to a 2 pronged bident
Hades Buff
Base Damage decreased from 75/115/155/195/235 to 70/105/140/175/210
Adjusted the Basic Attack hit to be more clear and less poppy.
Heal scaling added: 10% of Hades' Protections from Items
Decreased Per Tick Damage from 45/60/75/90/105 + 30% Intelligence per tick to 38/51/64/77/90 + 25% Intelligence

** Infused Strikes (P)
*** Increased Strength per stack from 2 to 5
** Somersault (1)
*** Increased Damage from 65/105/145/185/225 to 75/115/155/195/235
**** This also affects the second hit from this ability

“Hun Batz relies on his ultimate for the bulk of his power, making it tough to give his other abilities meaningful impact. We’re reducing the maximum Crowd Control it provides, adding some bonus scaling, and with this change we can increase the potency of Overhead Smash. Overhead Smash will no longer go on cooldown if interrupted, which requires us to move the Protection Shred off the channel and
Infused Strikes Slow gods hit by them, but do not grant Hun Batz the stacking Strength buff.

patch_samples.sample_text: No longer grants a charge of Explosive Bolts
Jing Wei Buff

“Jing Wei took a big hit after we removed the knockup and damage from Persistent Gust for enemies who walked into it after its initial deployment. We’re restoring these effects at a reduced strength, ensuring foes still need to respect the gust when chasing or retreating. At the same time, this adjustment prevents her from regaining the free wave clear that originally prompted the change.”
Jing Wei Nerf
Jing Wei Buff
Jing Wei Nerf
Jing Wei card art has been adjusted due to player feedback
Jing Wei Nerf (+agility fix)

abilities.name: Immovable
abilities.description:
You are Hard Displacement Immune, but are instead Dazed, a debuff that Slows you and increases the damage you take.
Additionally, hits from Attacks and Venomous Haze cause enemy gods to gain a Debuff stack. At max stacks, the next hit deals damage based on your Max Health or Strength, and resets the Debuff

patch_samples.sample_text: Jormungandr (Nerf)
Jormungandr (Shift)
Jormungandr (Shift)
Jormungandr (Shift)

Toxic clouds do not deal tick damage but allied gods within them gain Damage Reduction. Within them, you do not gain Cooling but lower cooldown for Venomous Haze. Consuming Bellow does not deal bonus damage but allies gain INT and STR. Submerge Knockup height is increased.
Wind Sprites grant Jormungandr a Movement Speed buff for 2 seconds

patch_samples.sample_text: Bleed Intelligence Scaling reduced from 10% to 7% per tick
Bonus Scaling per Rupture Stack reduced from 12.5% Intelligence and 10% Strength to 10% Intelligence and 8% Strength.
Added Ares and Kali bots
Kali (Buff)
Kali (Buff)

* Kali (Nerf)
** Nimble Strike (1)
*** Decreased Stacks of Rupture applied from 3 to 2.
*** Increased Cooldown from 12s to 13s.
** Incense (3)
*** Decreased Base Damage Strength Scaling from 20% to 15%.
*** Decreased Base Damage Intelligence Scaling from 40% to 30%.
*** Decreased Bonus Damage Strength Scaling from 12.5% to 10%.
*** Decreased Bonus Damage Intelligence Scaling from 17.5% to 12.5%.
*
Kali (Nerf)

* Kali
** Incense (3)
*** Decreased Bonus Intelligence Scaling per Rupture Stack from 22.5% to 17.5%.
*** Decreased Base Damage from 40/65/90/115/140 to 35/55/75/95/115.

Kali’s Basic Attacks are ranged. Rupture consumes at 5 stacks to deal damage and heal Kali. Incense no longer stuns or consumes Rupture. It knocks enemies away and applies Rupture. Destruction no longer damages, prevents death, or gives immunities. It now gives stats, lower cooldown, resets cooldown on Mark kills, and makes Kali’s Basics pierce applying 2 Rupture stacks.

* Kali
** Lash (2)
*** Decreased Intelligence Scaling from 30% to 25%.
*** Decreased Bleed Intelligence Scaling from 15% to 10%.
** Incense (3)
*** Decreased Heal Intelligence scaling from 10% to 7% per stack.
* Fixed an issue with Kali's Ability 3 (Incense) which was not granting the Strength/Intelligence buff

patch_samples.sample_text: Scaling increased from 80% to 90%

SMITE 2 flattened god Base Stats to improve flexibility. That worked, but it reduced some of the core differences between gods. We’re reintroducing some of that texture. Each god now has one standout base stat that fits their kit, like Kukulkan’s mana or Achilles’ physical protections. That makes gods feel more distinct without sacrificing flexibility.
Kukulkan (Shift)
Kukulkan (Aspect Nerf)
Kukulkan Buff
Kukulkan Buff
Kukulkan is now able to fire the dash version of Slipstream while this ability is deploying
Removed a case where his animation would hitch when firing his Basic Attack and strafing.
Damage Scaling per tick shifted from 18/19/20/21/22% Intelligence to a flat 20% Intelligence
Damage Scaling increased from 85% Intelligence to 80% Intelligence
Increased base damage per tick from 10/15/20/25/30 to 12/18/24/30/36

patch_samples.sample_text: Medusa (Nerf)
Increased Strength Scaling when not facing Medusa: 55% -> 70%.
Medusa (Buff)

* Viper Shot
** Medusa gains increased Attack Speed and augments her next 4 Basic Attacks, shooting vipers that poison the targets hit, dealing damage every 0.5s for 1.5s.
** New Feature: Each successful hit on an enemy god reduces the Cooldown of this ability by 0.5s.
** New Feature: The Attack Speed stim scales with Strength.

* Acid Spray
** Medusa spits acid that deals damage to the first enemy hit, which then sprays out in a cone behind them. Enemies hit have their Healing Taken reduced for 5s. Acid Spray will explode on statues Medusa has created.

* Petrify
** Medusa removes her mask, revealing her true face and delivering a powerful blast. Enemies are dealt damage and Stunned if they are looking at her or Slowed if they are not.
** New Feature: Statues are created when an enemy god is killed during any of the ability’s effects, including the Stun, Slow, or the damage.
** New Feature: When a statue is destroyed, the Cooldown of Lacerate is

*** Increased Damage from 10/12.5/15/17.5/20% to 15/17.5/20/22.5/25% of enemy’s Current Health

** Slice and Dice (2)
*** Increased Center Damage Strength Scaling from 80% to 90%
Nemesis Buff
Nemesis Buff
Nemesis Buff
Addressing Nemesis Swift Vengeance dash refire issues when using Normal cast at higher frame rates. NOTE: Please report if issues continue
Reduce enemy’s Movement Speed and Protections by the same amount.

New Feature: This ability now has scaling damage in addition to the Current Health damage, meaning that if you are building Strength or Intelligence, you will be able to kill an enemy with this ability.

Mysterious Fog travels slightly before stopping, allowing you to fire Attacks within it and remain Stealthed. Shining Metal and Fire Shards scale with Attack Power, and procs Attack Item Effects. Attacks reduce the Cooldown of Shining Metal. Additionally Strength of Fire also provides Attack Speed.

Nut’s Convergence is now properly considered a single ability fire, regardless of the amount of ammo that you have. This means that subsequent shots will properly know if the previous shots had triggered an item effect and will respect once per ability or once per ability target rules.

Pele (Base Buff)
Pele (Buff)
Pele (Buff)

* Pele
** Aspect of Obsidian - Releasing June 6
*** You only gain Fuel from Pyroclast and when damaged by enemies instead of over time. Magma Rush can no longer be refired but now provides Healing. Additionally Everlasting Flame now provides Protections instead of Strength and Lifesteal, and Volcanic Lightning damage no longer has Strength Scaling.

* Pele (Nerf)
** Eruption (2)
*** Decreased Inner Strength Scaling from 80% to 70% and Outer Strength Scaling from 60% to 50%
** Magma Rush (3)
*** Decreased Amped Damage Scaling from 20% to 15%.
Pele’s Eruption now ALWAYS gains a burst of Movement Speed during the prefire of Eruption.

* Pele Buff
** Everlasting Flame
*** Increased Duration from 4s to 6s
** Pyroclast
*** Decreased Cooldown from 15s to 15/14.5/14/13.5/13s
** Eruption
*** Increased Knockup Height by 25%

* Magma Rush
** Repeatedly deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies and gain movement speed while this ability is active. Magma Rush uses Fuel for its duration and has no cooldown.
** Reactivate this ability to amplify the effect, expending more fuel but dealing increased Physical Damage and gaining additional movement speed.

patch_samples.sample_text: Ra (Buff)
Ra (Buff)

* Ra Buff
** Searing Pain (4)
*** Increased True Damage dealt from 5% to 8% of Target’s Max HP
Increased Magical Protection from 30 to 40

* Ra Shift
** Celestial Beam
*** Increased Damage Scaling from 100% INT to 105% INT
** Divine Light
*** Shifted Solar Ray Damage from 30/70/100/130/160 + 45% INT to 25/60/85/110/135 + 55% INT
*** Increased Cooldown from 12s to 14/13.5/13/12.5/12s
** Solar Blessing
*** Increased Damage Scaling per tick from 25% INT to 30% INT
Shifted Solar Ray Damage from 30/70/100/130/160 + 45% INT to 25/60/85/110/135 + 55% INT

Fixed an issue where the Towers near the Teleporters could be hit from outside their range with longer penetrating basic attacks (Ra’s Divine Light). Now if you hit the Tower from over the wall, you’ll be considered as a valid target for 1 second and get hit unless you leave the radius, so free Tower damage can no longer happen
Ra Buff
This buff stacks up to 3 times
The Divine Light blind has been adjusted to be a bit less harsh for photosensitive people.

patch_samples.sample_text: Rama Fix/Buff - Rama's Basic Attacks while using Astral Strike (1) should now knockback minions directly backwards, rather than left or right if the projectile hit them off center

* Rama Shift
** Aspect of Precision
*** Astral Strike (1)
**** Decreased Slow Max Stacks from 3 to 2

* Sobek Nerf

*** Increased Cooldown from 16/15.5/15/14.5/14s to 16s at all ranks

patch_samples.sample_text:
* Sol Nerf
** Aspect of Conflagration
*** Disapparate (3)
**** Decreased Damage and Intelligence Scaling from 90/130/170/210/250 + 60% to 80/120/160/200/240 + 50%
Sol Nerf
Sol's Heat provides Intelligence and Ability Damage, but no longer provides Strength, Attack Speed, and Basic Attack Damage. Sol erupts and deals damage around her when becomes immune in Disapparate.
Sol Buff
Sol Buff
Sol Buff
Sol Buff
Sol Nerf
Damage Scaling increased from 45% Intelligence to 45% Intelligence + 25% Strength
Adjusted the VFX to better match the expansion and contraction.
This ability now grants Sol Haste
Base STR has been nerfed across all gods, in differing amounts.

: When you drop below 60% health, gain increased Strength, Intelligence, and Protections. If you go above this threshold, the buff persists for a short duration. When you drop below 30% health, you spawn a clone. This effect has a cooldown.

: 72 Transformations has a reduced Cooldown and locks your animal form until Somersault Cloud is used. Locking in Ox form causes Master’s Will to Knockup. patch_samples.sample_text:
* Susano Buff
** Wind Siphon (2)
*** Increased Damage from 90/120/150/180/210 to 90/130/170/210/250
** Typhoon (4)
*** Increased Max Damage from 220/285/350/415/480 to 250/310/370/430/490

“Susano has continued to struggle despite our recent buff attempts, so we’re implementing more significant changes to help him thrive. His original Smite 1 Passive was a powerhouse, but the newer version proved too difficult to fully utilize. By cutting the stacks in half, Susano can now build and maintain his passive more easily, although it still requires three inhand cancels for its full effect
Susano’s pull should now better attempt to keep targets in their relative position in the cone when they are pulled to Susano.

* Susano Buff
** Storm’s Edge
*** Increased Buff/Debuff Duration from 3s to 4s
** Typhoon
*** Increased Knockup Height by 25%
Susano Nerf
Susano Nerf
Removed the Typhoon VFX that was visible while this ability was building up.
Adjusted the projectile VFX to not cover up the hit VFX as much, and updated the hit VFX to be more visible.
Increased the maximum radius from 3.2m to 4m.

patch_samples.sample_text: Increased Thanatos’ ultimate screech attenuation and added the original tail to the sound

* Thanatos Buff
** Death Scythe (1)
*** Increased Bonus damage dealt to Gods from 10% to 12.5% of their Max Health
*** Increased Strength Scaling from 80% to 85%
** Scent of Death (2)
*** Increased low health Bonus Damage from 5/7.5/10/12.5/15% to 15%

* Thanatos Buff
** Harvester of Souls (P)
*** Increased Minion Kill Heal from 8.5% of their Max Health to 10%
** Death Scythe (1)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 12s to 11s
** Soul Reap (3)
*** Increased Silence duration from 0.75s to 1s
Thanatos Shift
Fixed an issue with Thanatos Ultimate where he would retain his speed buff after respawn
These items no longer require Mana, allowing Thanatos and Yemoja to use them.
Harvester of Souls no longer Heals Thanatos but provides permanent Max Health. Additionally Soul Reap deals bonus damage and Heals Thanatos based on his Max Health.
Thanatos Buff
Thanatos Buff
Thanatos is re-enabled! Fixed an issue where he could no longer move or attack when he died in his Ultimate
Thanatos Buff
[VFX Rework] Updated the VFX and animation to ensure the moment of landing is appropriately snappy and intense.

Thor (Aspect Nerf)

Thor (Buff)
Thor (Buff)
Thor Buff
Thor Nerf

patch_samples.sample_text: “Yemoja on the other hand is pretty firmly only using her non-aspect in Support, focusing our adjustments to her Support playstyle to be just nerfs. Her early game pressure is high, but we want her to return to her current strength by as early as mid game. Separately, her Aspect is getting some additional scaling to offset these adjustments and help bring up a struggling Aspect.”
Yemoja Buff

* Yemoja Buff
** Mending Waters (2)
*** Increased Shield Health and Scaling from 30/55/80/105/130 + 2% Max Health to 40/65/90/115/140 + 4% Max Health
** River’s Rebuke (4)
*** Decreased Cooldown from 140/135/130/125/120s to 120s

* Yemoja Buff
** Aspect of Downpour
*** Moonstrike (1B)
**** Increased Inner hit Damage Scaling from 75% to 85%
*** Mending Waters (2)
**** Increased Subsequent bounce damage from 50% to 65%
Yemoja’s Ability 2 targeter sizing has been adjusted to match gameplay
Yemoja Buff
Mending Waters no longer affects allies but stops and bounces on enemy gods, dealing damage, shield damage and providing Yemoja 6/7/8/9/10 Int per hit, stacking up to 6 times, for 10s.

* Yemoja Nerf
** Mending Waters
*** Decreased Shield Health from 30/60/90/120/150 + 3% Max Health to 30/55/80/105/130 + 2% Max Health
Yemoja Buff
Yemoja Nerf
